--- is_not_labeled.sql
e IS NOT LABELED Transfers & Owns

--- AST
&ast.IsLabeledExpr{
  Not:  true,
  Left: &ast.Ident{
    NameEnd: 1,
    Name:    "e",
  },
  Label: &ast.GQLLabelBinaryExpr{
    Op:   "&",
    Left: &ast.GQLNameLabel{
      Name: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 17,
        NameEnd: 26,
        Name:    "Transfers",
      },
    },
    Right: &ast.GQLNameLabel{
      Name: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 29,
        NameEnd: 33,
        Name:    "Owns",
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
e IS NOT LABELED Transfers & Owns
